nasb.text: The Lord will make the rain of your land powder and dust; from heaven it shall come down on you until you are destroyed.

esv.text: The Lord will make the rain of your land powder. From heaven dust shall come down on you until you are destroyed.

cnv.text: 耶和華必使你地上的雨水變為飛沙塵土，從天上下到你身上，直到你被消滅。

ccb.text: “祂要使雨水变为尘土，降在你们身上，直到你们灭亡。
